title: Mini Tardis: BOTI
description: A work in progress addon for Mini Tardis to provide Immersive Portals integration.
body:
# Overview

This is a highly work in progress compatibility layer between [Mini Tardis](https://modrinth.com/mod/mini-tardis) and [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals), using the latter to create a "Bigger on the Inside" or BOTI effect for the TARDIS. It additionally fixes a hard incompatibility that Mini Tardis has with Immersive Portals when used alone together.

![A glimpse into a TARDIS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68be2401a8a1b20565ea4eb3a7aa5fd263463a16.png)

# Important

This mod completely and utterly smashes and destroys the Polymer-based server-side functionality of Mini Tardis I worked so hard to create, though it does so in a moderately controlled manner. This is to say, **it will only work when used on both server and client.**

# Disclaimer

Despite being fully functional in testing, this mod is marked alpha for a reason. Expect bugs, and please report any you find on the issue tracker or my Discord.
